context_text: <B> and it's you know the thing is it's worth you know you've got to agree on the way you discipline them too because / <A> no / <B> w with my ex wife she would if i if i disciplined the kids she would tell me when i got home from work you need to discipline the kids i would discipline the kids and then right in front of the kids she would get on my case / <A> yeah / <B> and that you can't do that we even had a counselor say you need to stop doing that because that's showing your kids they don't need to mind their father / <A> right
